sample_reviews.author: James T
sample_reviews.text: Mark arrived quickly and sorted our burst pipe with no fuss. Very professional and tidy — would definitely recommend.

sample_reviews.author: Sarah M
sample_reviews.text: Brilliant service from start to finish. Fair pricing and Mark clearly knows his stuff. Our new bathroom looks fantastic.

sample_reviews.author: David H
sample_reviews.text: Called Mark out for a boiler issue and he had it fixed the same day. Good communication and honest about the costs.

brand.usp: Mark Anthony Plumbing delivers honest, reliable plumbing and heating services across Birmingham with prompt response times and transparent pricing. No call-out surprises — just quality workmanship you can trust.
brand.hero_headline: Your Trusted Plumber in Birmingham, Ready Now
brand.about_paragraph: I'm Mark, a fully qualified and Gas Safe registered plumber based in Erdington, Birmingham. With years of hands-on experience across plumbing and central heating, I take pride in delivering a reliable, tidy, and honest service to every customer. Whether it's an emergency callout or a planned bathroom installation, I'm here to get the job done right.
